title: MapReduce Delegation Token Identifier
description: The Java class `DelegationTokenIdentifier` in Hadoop MapReduce's security/token/delegation directory is responsible for managing delegation tokens specific to MapReduce jobs. It extends `AbstractDelegationTokenIdentifier` to provide MapReduce-specific functionality, defining a constant `MAPREDUCE_DELEGATION_KIND` for token identification. The class constructs token identifiers with owner, renewer, and real user details, and returns the token kind via the `getKind()` method. It doesn't handle traditional inputs/outputs but manages secure job submission and tracking by creating and identifying delegation tokens. The class depends on Hadoop's classification, IO, and security token delegation packages.

raw_response:
TITLE: MapReduce Delegation Token Identifier

DESCRIPTION:
The Java class `DelegationTokenIdentifier` in Hadoop MapReduce's security/token/delegation directory is responsible for managing delegation tokens specific to MapReduce jobs. It extends `AbstractDelegationTokenIdentifier` to provide MapReduce-specific functionality, defining a constant `MAPREDUCE_DELEGATION_KIND` for token identification. The class constructs token identifiers with owner, renewer, and real user details, and returns the token kind via the `getKind()` method. It doesn't handle traditional inputs/outputs but manages secure job submission and tracking by creating and identifying delegation tokens. The class depends on Hadoop's classification, IO, and security token delegation packages.
